title: TCWP Reward Signal (JSONL line)
description: Online learning signal from production interactions. Supports real-time RL, replay-vs-explore optimization, and continuous model improvement.

step_ref.description: Optional reference to specific step that generated this signal

signal.description: What happened (user_accepted_shortcut, checkpoint_passed, drift_detected, rerun_succeeded, etc.)

value.description: Reward value. Positive = good outcome, negative = bad outcome, 0 = neutral.

context.description: Contextual features for the reward signal

counterfactual.description: What would have happened under a different policy (for off-policy learning)

temporal_discount.description: Discount factor for delayed rewards (1.0 = immediate, 0.0 = fully discounted)
